mapper.sql: id, inquiry_apply_no, item_no, task_no, fpType, order_no, version, reply_dept, supplier_order_no, reply_no, reply_delivery_date, reply_user, reply_time, reply_delay_reason, reply_remark, inquiry_level, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, reply_supplier_dept, poNo, lineItem, rorder_no, rorder_item, splitItemNo, smcCode, purchaseType, inquiry_reason_param, rorder_splitno, model_no, quantity, order_status, supplier_id, hope_export_date, dlv_moddate, hope_delivery_date, reply_delivery_date_src, reply_result_desc
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inquiry_detail
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inquiry_detail (id, inquiry_apply_no, item_no, task_no, fpType, order_no, version, reply_dept, supplier_order_no, reply_no, reply_delivery_date, reply_user, reply_time, reply_delay_reason, reply_remark, inquiry_level, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, reply_supplier_dept, poNo, lineItem, rorder_no, rorder_item, splitItemNo, smcCode, purchaseType, inquiry_reason_param, rorder_splitno, model_no, quantity, order_status, supplier_id, hope_export_date, dlv_moddate, hope_delivery_date, reply_delivery_date_src, reply_result_desc ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{inquiryApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{taskNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{replyDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replyDeliveryDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{replyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{replyDelayReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{replyRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{inquiryLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{replySupplierDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{inquiryReasonParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rorderSplitno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hopeExportDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{dlvModdate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{hopeDeliveryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{replyDeliveryDateSrc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replyResultDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} )

insert into dbo.ops_inquiry_detail
id,
inquiry_apply_no,
item_no,
task_no,
fpType,

version,

lineItem,

purchaseType,

quantity,
order_status,
supplier_id,

dlv_moddate,
hope_delivery_date,
reply_delivery_date_src,
reply_result_desc,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_inquiry_detail
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
inquiry_apply_no = #{record.inquiryApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
task_no = #{record.taskNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fpType = #{record.fptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reply_dept = #{record.replyDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_order_no = #{record.supplierOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_no = #{record.replyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_delivery_date = #{record.replyDeliveryDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_user = #{record.replyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_time = #{record.replyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_delay_reason = #{record.replyDelayReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
reply_remark = #{record.replyRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inquiry_level = #{record.inquiryLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_supplier_dept = #{record.replySupplierDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lineItem = #{record.lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_item = #{record.rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{record.splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
smcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchaseType = #{record.purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR},
inquiry_reason_param = #{record.inquiryReasonParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_splitno = #{record.rorderSplitno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_status = #{record.orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_id = #{record.supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hope_export_date = #{record.hopeExportDate,jdbcType=DATE},
dlv_moddate = #{record.dlvModdate,jdbcType=DATE},
hope_delivery_date = #{record.hopeDeliveryDate,jdbcType=DATE},
reply_delivery_date_src = #{record.replyDeliveryDateSrc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_result_desc = #{record.replyResultDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_inquiry_detail
inquiry_apply_no = #{inquiryApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
task_no = #{taskNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fpType = #{fptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reply_dept = #{replyDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_order_no = #{supplierOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_no = #{replyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_delivery_date = #{replyDeliveryDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_user = #{replyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_time = #{replyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_delay_reason = #{replyDelayReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
reply_remark = #{replyRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
inquiry_level = #{inquiryLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_supplier_dept = #{replySupplierDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lineItem = #{lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_item = #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
smcCode = #{smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchaseType = #{purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR},
inquiry_reason_param = #{inquiryReasonParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_splitno = #{rorderSplitno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_status = #{orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_id = #{supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hope_export_date = #{hopeExportDate,jdbcType=DATE},
dlv_moddate = #{dlvModdate,jdbcType=DATE},
hope_delivery_date = #{hopeDeliveryDate,jdbcType=DATE},
reply_delivery_date_src = #{replyDeliveryDateSrc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_result_desc = #{replyResultDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_inquiry_detail set inquiry_apply_no = #{inquiryApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, task_no = #{taskNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fpType = #{fptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reply_dept = #{replyDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_order_no = #{supplierOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_no = #{replyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_delivery_date = #{replyDeliveryDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, reply_user = #{replyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_time = #{replyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, reply_delay_reason = #{replyDelayReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, reply_remark = #{replyRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, inquiry_level = #{inquiryLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, reply_supplier_dept = #{replySupplierDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, poNo = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lineItem = #{lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rorder_item = #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, splitItemNo = #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, smcCode = #{smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, purchaseType = #{purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR}, inquiry_reason_param = #{inquiryReasonParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rorder_splitno = #{rorderSplitno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_status = #{orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_id = #{supplierId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hope_export_date = #{hopeExportDate,jdbcType=DATE}, dlv_moddate = #{dlvModdate,jdbcType=DATE}, hope_delivery_date = #{hopeDeliveryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, reply_delivery_date_src = #{replyDeliveryDateSrc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_result_desc = #{replyResultDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
